title: Crossing roads and highways
doc_html:
§4369.  Crossing roads and highways

Police juries may allow railways utilizing electric or motive power other than steam to cross over all roads and highways within their jurisdiction and to construct, maintain and operate tracks across the highways under any conditions which the police juries impose.
doc_text:
§4369.  Crossing roads and highways
Police juries may allow railways utilizing electric or motive power other than steam to cross over all roads and highways within their jurisdiction and to construct, maintain and operate tracks across the highways under any conditions which the police juries impose.
